greeting: Hello! Thanks for calling Acme Corp support. How can I help you today?
farewell: Thanks for contacting Acme Corp! Have a great day.
escalation_message: Let me connect you with a specialist who can help further. Please hold on.

policies.returns: 30-day return window from delivery date. Item must be in original packaging. Free return shipping label provided.
policies.replacements: Replacement items ship within 2 business days. Original item must be returned within 14 days.
policies.refunds: Refunds processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.
policies.warranty: 2-year standard warranty on all electronics. Covers manufacturing defects. Does not cover accidental damage.
policies.shipping: Standard shipping 5-7 business days (free). Express shipping 1-2 business days ($19.99).

faqs.q: How do I track my order?
faqs.a: Visit acme.com/track and enter your order number, or I can look it up for you.

faqs.q: How do I reset my device?
faqs.a: Hold the power button for 10 seconds, then release. The device will restart.
Yes, 15% off with a valid .edu email. Apply at acme.com/education.
Yes, extended warranty available for $99/year. Can be purchased within the first year.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, PayPal, Apple Pay, and financing through Affirm.
